colors.name: paper
colors.role: background — recycled stock; the page is a sheet, not a screen

colors.name: ink
colors.role: all functional text, 3px rules, hard shadows (16.3:1 on paper)

colors.name: acid-yellow
colors.role: row highlights, CTA surface, ::selection, marquee row B — carries ink text at 13.0:1

colors.name: riso-blue
colors.role: misregistration plate, halftone dots, cutting-mat grid, focus ring on yellow (5.9:1 on paper, 4.7:1 on yellow)

colors.name: fluo-red
colors.role: misregistration plate, stamps, rush tag — 2.9:1 on paper so display/decorative only; as a surface it carries ink text at 5.7:1

fonts.role: Latin display — the wordmark and section titles, shouting
every Hangul glyph on the page — condensed, deadpan; Latin stacks fall through into it
labels, prices, annotations, marquee slogans — the ledger hand

texture: One fixed full-viewport SVG rect filtered through feTurbulence (fractalNoise, baseFrequency 0.8, 2 octaves, stitchTiles) with a feColorMatrix that zeroes RGB and scales alpha to 0.1, then multiplied over the page at opacity 0.55 — static paper grain, never animated. Under it, overprint logic: solid-ink elements (misregistration plates, ink stickers, halftone dots) use mix-blend-mode: multiply so overlaps darken like stacked riso layers; paper-backed decals stay opaque.

motion.name: press-in
motion.value: 0ms — :active snaps translate(6px,6px) as the hard shadow collapses to 0; no easing, deliberately (anti-easing)

motion.name: press-out
motion.value: 90ms linear snap-back on release — a rubber stamp, not a spring

motion.name: row-press
motion.value: 3px nudge on table rows, same 0ms/90ms pair

motion.name: marquee-base
motion.value: 0.066 px/ms (~66 px/s); sign flips with scroll direction, per-row opposed

motion.name: marquee-boost
motion.value: +0.055 px/ms per unit of smoothed scroll velocity, capped at 0.34 px/ms total

motion.name: marquee-approach
motion.value: signed speed lerps to target by 1 − 0.88^(dt/16.7) per frame — a flip is a skid, not a teleport

motion.name: sticker-friction
motion.value: 0.93 per 60fps-normalized frame — a hard fling glides roughly 400px

motion.name: sticker-bounce
motion.value: restitution 0.45 off the table edges; spin damped ×0.6 on impact

motion.name: sticker-torque
motion.value: vr = 0.6 × (vx·−gy + vy·gx) — release velocity crossed with the grab offset; grab a corner and it spins

motion.name: sticker-sleep
motion.value: all bodies rest below 0.004 px/ms; rAF loop stops when the table is quiet

motion.name: misreg-twitch
motion.value: 8.4s cycle — the blue/red plates stumble for ~2 ticks, then re-register
